[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:

The main visual focus is the stacked text, with “loading” at the top, “lemot” in the middle, and “vidio” at the bottom.

The setting is unclear because the image is a simple text-only graphic with a plain white background and no other visible elements.

Practical Summary:
This image displays three lines of large black text on a white background. No other objects or elements are visible besides the text.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

loading  
lemot  
video

# Structured Version

- video

# Notes

The text appears to be stacked vertically. The middle line (“lemot”) may be a misspelling or cropped text; however, it is transcribed exactly as shown.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

Gambar ini menampilkan teks "loading lemot vidio" dalam bahasa Indonesia yang berarti "memuat video lambat". Teks tersebut ditampilkan dengan gaya tulisan tangan yang buram.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
